SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: REDUCED_GAP_CS 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 

N = No 

9 = Not applicable 

X = Unknown 

COMMENT: 
This variable is only available 2007–2011. It applies ONLY to the Enhanced Alternative Plans that offer 
reduced cost-sharing (i.e., where variable called REDUCED_COST_SHARE= “Y”).
